headline: Boeing and LightSolver Form Strategic Financial Partnership to Develop Laser-Based Accelerator for Large-Scale Engineering Simulation
summary: Accelerated PDE solving will make simulations faster, more energy efficient and more accessible across global industriesTEL AVIV, Israel, April 28, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- LightSolver, a pioneer in laser-based computing for physics-intensive workloads, today announced a strategic financial partnership with Boeing (NYSE: BA) to advance laser-based computing acceleration for complex engineering simulations. The collaboration focuses on improving the performance, scalability, and energy efficiency
